name: Cabbage Ground Beef Skillet
recipeIngredient: 6 ounce can tomato paste OR 1 pound canned tomato puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in an electric skillet, stirring to break up.
2. Add onion, cabbage, and rice to the skillet.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, tomato paste or puree, water, and seasonings.
4. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally and adding more water if needed until rice is tender.
